note: Called all 4 ScrapedDuck API endpoints live, captured full response payloads. Found 3 key discrepancies vs existing docs: (1) eggType format changed to "N km" strings with new 1km tier, (2) GBL and GO Fest events use UTC timestamps with Z suffix, (3) some research tasks omit type field. Updated scrapedduck-api.md, edge-cases.md, api-reliability-assessment.md, and event-dto-contract.md with findings including new IsUtcTime DTO field.
